visualization.title: Number of computer labs per building

resultRaw.sql:
SELECT building AS building,
       COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE has_computers = true) AS computer_lab_count
FROM public.classrooms
GROUP BY building
ORDER BY building ASC;

issues: Visualization uses the SQL-produced, pre-aggregated field computer_lab_count (Vega-Lite has no aggregate specified) — that's fine, but note aggregation is done in SQL, not in the chart spec.
Buildings that have no rows in public.classrooms will not appear in the result; only buildings present in the table (even with a 0 computer_lab_count) will be shown.

visualization.title: Number of computer labs per building

result.sql:
SELECT building AS building,
       COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE has_computers = true) AS computer_lab_count
FROM public.classrooms
GROUP BY building
ORDER BY building ASC;

issues: Visualization uses the SQL-produced, pre-aggregated field computer_lab_count (Vega-Lite has no aggregate specified) — that's fine, but note aggregation is done in SQL, not in the chart spec.
Buildings that have no rows in public.classrooms will not appear in the result; only buildings present in the table (even with a 0 computer_lab_count) will be shown.
